connection.failed: Connection failed. Please check your network and try again.

websocket.failed: WebSocket connection failed. Real-time updates may not work.

discord.apiError: Discord API error occurred. Please try again later.
discord.rateLimited: Rate limited by Discord. Please wait before trying again.
discord.unauthorized: Bot authorization failed. Please check bot permissions.

command.invalid: Invalid command. Please check the command syntax.
command.unauthorized: You don't have permission to execute this command.
command.failed: Command execution failed. Please try again.

execution.botNotReady: Bot is not ready to execute commands.
execution.permissionDenied: Bot lacks permission to execute this command.

command.guildMissing: You must specify a guild for this command.

upload.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is {{maxSize}}MB.
upload.failed: File upload failed. Please try again.

processing.failed: File processing failed. Please check the file format.
processing.corrupted: File appears to be corrupted or invalid.
processing.unsupported: File format not supported for audio playback.

storage.full: Storage quota exceeded. Please delete some files first.

voice.notConnected: Bot is not connected to a voice channel.
voice.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to voice channel.
voice.permissionDenied: Bot lacks permission to join voice channel.

source.geoblocked: Content is not available in your region.
source.ageRestricted: Content is age-restricted and cannot be played.
source.copyright: Content blocked due to copyright restrictions.

bot.notConnected: Bot is not connected to any voice channel.

management.setActiveFailed: Failed to set active bot instance.
management.multipleInstances: Multiple bot instances detected. Please specify which one to use.
management.noInstances: No bot instances are currently running.

state.unavailable: Bot state information is currently unavailable.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.minLength: Must be at least {{min}} characters long.
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {{max}} characters long.

network.offline: You appear to be offline. Please check your internet connection.
network.slowConnection: Slow network detected. Some features may be limited.
network.serverUnavailable: Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
geneeric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

component.crashed: This component has encountered an error and needs to be reloaded.

api.timeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
api.unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
api.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input and try again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
api.serverError: Server error occurred. Please try again later.

musicPlayer.play: Make sure the bot is connected to a voice channel and try again.
musicPlayer.upload: Check that your file is a supported audio format and under 50MB.

commandExecutor.execute: Verify all required fields are filled and try again.

websocket.connection: Check your internet connection. The page will automatically reconnect when possible.

fileUploader.upload: Ensure your file is a supported audio format (MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A) and under the size limit.
fileUploader.processing: Try uploading the file again or check if the file is corrupted.

botManagement.setActive: Make sure the bot instance is online and try again.
botManagement.connection: Check if the bot is properly configured and has the necessary permissions.
